title: Operational incident extraction schema — v1
description: Extracts a structured summary from a Jira incident ticket. Owner: aira/incident KB team. Spec ref: §4.1, ADR-003.

root_cause_summary.description: One-paragraph (<=500 chars) summary of the underlying root cause. Cite specific subsystems, error codes, or change events. Do not include mitigation steps here.

blast_radius.description: Who/what was affected. Examples: 'all tenants on FA 25.01', 'tenants in EMEA region', 'tenant-123 only'.

duration_minutes.description: Total time the incident degraded service, in minutes. Use 0 for near-misses.

resources_affected.description: Logical names of services / pods / tenants involved (entity URNs preferred when available).

ora_codes.description: Oracle error codes seen during the incident (e.g. 'ORA-1017'). Empty if none.

tenant_ids.description: Customer/tenant IDs affected. Empty if platform-wide.

service_owner.description: Primary owning team for the failing service.

resolution_summary.description: What fixed it. Include the change reference (PR/commit) if known.

links.description: Related URLs: the incident ticket, related design docs, post-mortems, etc.
